allow: PowerShell($user = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','User'\); $sys = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','Machine'\); Write-Output '=== USER PATH ==='; $user -split ';' | Where-Object { $_ -match 'node' }; Write-Output '=== SYSTEM PATH ==='; $sys -split ';' | Where-Object { $_ -match 'node' })
Bash(node -e "const code = require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('app/assets/js/pagination.js','utf8'\); new Function\(code.replace\('window','globalThis'\)\); console.log\('pagination.js parses OK'\);")

Bash(node -e "const c = require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('app/assets/js/pagination.js','utf8'\); new Function\('global', c\); console.log\('parses ok'\); console.log\('contains pgn-scroll:', c.includes\('pgn-scroll'\)\); console.log\('contains buildPageList:', c.includes\('buildPageList'\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const c = require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('app/assets/js/pagination.js','utf8'\); new Function\('global', c\); console.log\('parses ok'\); console.log\('has arrow chars:', c.includes\('8249'\) && c.includes\('8250'\)\);")
